description: Out-of-scope (substance-use, canonical): description points clearly to substance-use territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'substance-use'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: I drink a lot. I started during the pandemic and I just haven't stopped. I usually have a few glasses with dinner, then keep going through the evening. I've tried to cut back but I always end up back where I was. It's affecting my work and my marriage.
